title: Neocupressus
taxonomy: Neocupressus is classified as a genus of coniferous trees within the cypress family (Cupressaceae) and order Cupressales. It is a relatively rare and newly recognized genus. The classification is based on molecular phylogenetic studies that have helped to refine the relationships among different species of cypress. Neocupressus is closely related to the genus Xanthocyparis, and some sources consider them to be part of the same genus. Further research is needed to fully understand the classification and relationships within the Neocupressus genus.
